svg.text: Verified Live Flow: ICT 12-Gate State Machine + Kingsbalfx Fallback
Raw code path: main.py → pre_trade_analysis.py → unified_strategy.py → Kingsbalfx only after ICT SKIP → broker-safe execution
MT5 connect, symbol universe, scan batches
Build D1/H4 context, H1, M15, M5, M1 data
SMT not mandatory; news can block live entry
ICT Core: every gate must pass in order

g.text: G1 Narrative: H1 trend aligns with current-H1 M15 candles
G2 External liquidity: H1/M15/M5 liquidity exists
G3 Sweep: price trades beyond liquidity and closes back inside
G4 Displacement: body ≥ 60% and range ≥ ATR
G5 MSS/BOS: opposing swing break or structure confirms
G6 True FVG: displacement creates 3-candle FVG
G7 True OB: final opposing candle before displacement
G8 Premium/discount: FVG or OB in correct half
G9 Target: opposing liquidity gives minimum 1.5R
G10 Retracement: FVG or OB or OTE touched
G11 LTF confirmation: M1/M5 rejection/engulf/momentum
G12 Plan: market entry, structural SL, liquidity TP
If any gate fails: ICT returns SKIP immediately with failed_step and reason.

svg.text: Kingsbalfx Fallback: runs only after ICT SKIP

g.text: K1 Context: previous-day D1/H4 background + H1/M15/M5 states
K2 Bias: H1 and M15 alignment or recoverable state direction
K3 Target: liquidity, FVG, OB, or OTE target/zone
K4 H1 setup: continuation or reversal signal
K5 M15 refinement: sweep, FVG/OB, Sweet Zone, or Judas
K6 M5 trigger: two strong candles or one engulf/breakout candle
K7 Risk: SL beyond swing/structure, TP at target, RR ≥ 1.5
K8 Broker sizing: mt5_connector.calculate_volume_for_risk()
K9 Return request: strategy='kingsbalfx' for main.py execution
If any required fallback condition fails: Kingsbalfx returns SKIP reason.
It does not replace ICT. It gives one second binary chance after strict ICT rejects.

svg.text: spread, stop distance, margin, duplicate, max trades
Validation: whole project compile PASS • strategy imports PASS • tests PASS 31/31 • git diff --check PASS
